case_title: BAY MEDIA FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS. JASON RAMIREZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAY MEDIA FEDERAL CREDIT UNION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAY MEDIA FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, JASON $953.87 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,103.87 PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $100.00 EVERY TWO WEEKS, BEGINNING ON DEC-17-2010 AND EVERY TWO WEEKS THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, JASON

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-01-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (**REQUEST TO ADVANCE**) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAY MEDIA FEDERAL CREDIT UNION

ORDER ON REQUEST TO ADVANCE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS DENIED BECAUSE: DEFENDANT APPARENTLY HAS MOVED. THE COURT IS NOT CONFIDENT THAT NOTICE OF A NEW HEARING DATE WILL BE RECEIVED. THE CURRENT DECEMBER HEARING DATE STANDS. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2010 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED JUN-08-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, JASON

CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO THE DEFEDANT JASON RAMIREZ, RETURNED "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
